title: A docket rumor becomes institutional heat
player_safe_summary: The party enters Lantern Docket and discovers that a routine request is entangled with local pressure, reputation, and a decision that cannot be solved by force alone.
gm_deep_summary: Run the opening using the Lantern Docket quickstart card, then escalate through one authority, one pressured intermediary, and one consequence if the players ignore procedure.
